summary: Iteration 13: Google SVG icon and cybersecurity theme changes verified. All visual updates working correctly - Google colored G icon on auth buttons, deep navy background (#0a0e1a), cyan/electric blue accents (#00b4ff), OR dividers between OAuth and email forms.
passed_tests: Frontend: Login page shows Google SVG icon with 4 Google brand colors (blue #4285F4, green #34A853, yellow #FBBC05, red #EA4335)
Frontend: Signup page shows Google SVG icon with 4 Google brand colors
Frontend: Login page has 'OR' divider between OAuth buttons and email form
Frontend: Signup page has 'OR' divider between OAuth buttons and email form
Frontend: Login page has deep navy background rgb(10, 14, 26) matching #0a0e1a
Frontend: Signup page has deep navy background rgb(10, 14, 26) matching #0a0e1a
Frontend: Landing page renders with cybersecurity theme - deep navy background, cyan accents
Frontend: Pricing page renders correctly with all 5 pricing tiers
Frontend: Login page renders with both OAuth buttons (Google, GitHub), email form, and Sign In button
Frontend: Signup page renders with both OAuth buttons (Google, GitHub), email form, and Create Account button
Frontend: Google callback page at /auth/google/callback shows error handling ('Authentication Failed', 'No authorization code received from Google', 'Back to Login' link)
Frontend: Email login flow works - successfully logs in test@cursorcode.ai and redirects to dashboard
Backend: POST /api/auth/login works with test credentials (test@cursorcode.ai)
Backend: GET /api/auth/google returns 503 'Google OAuth not configured' (expected - keys not set locally)
critical_code_review_comments: GoogleIcon SVG component correctly implemented with 4 Google brand colors in both LoginPage.js and SignupPage.js
Tailwind config updated with cybersecurity colors: void (#0a0e1a), electric (#00b4ff)
index.css body background correctly set to #0a0e1a
Glow effects and glass effects use correct rgba(0, 180, 255, x) values matching #00b4ff
All data-testid attributes present on auth buttons (login-google-btn, login-github-btn, signup-google-btn, signup-github-btn)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 13 verified UI/theme changes: Google SVG icons with colored G (blue, green, yellow, red), cybersecurity theme with deep navy background (#0a0e1a) and bright cyan-blue accent (#00b4ff), OR dividers between OAuth buttons and email forms. All auth pages (Login, Signup, Google callback) render correctly. Email login flow tested and working. Background color verified via getComputedStyle as rgb(10, 14, 26).
